result:
All 484 assertions pass. All bugs fixed.

Summary of bugs fixed:
- **Mechanical (auto-fixed)**: 6 wrong-accessor type errors
- **Type errors fixed manually**: missing args to `orders-in-period`, `find-order-by-id`, `customer-id`, `reorder-needed`; wrong accessor swaps (`carrier-id`→`carrier-base-rate`, `campaign-id`→`campaign-start-date`, `customer-id`→`customer-tier`, etc.); `Notification` missing `reference-id` arg
- **Logic bugs**: 
  - `product-margin` (cost-price → price-cost)
  - `tier-discount-pct` (gold/bronze values swapped)
  - `reorder-needed` (`>` → `<`)
  - `calculate-total` (`+ discount` → `- discount`)
  - `calculate-tax` (extra `* 2` removed)
  - `coupon-discount-amount` (`/10` → `/100`)
  - `line-commission` (`+` → `*`)
  - `poline-total` (`+` → `*`)
  - `zone-surcharge` (`+` → `*`)
  - `entries-in-period` (second `>=` → `<=`)
  - `total-commission` (calling param as function)
